title: Lunch Prep: Lemon-Herb Chicken & Asparagus
time: Prep: 15 min | Cook: 25 min | Total: 40 min
bodyHtml:
Time: 40 mins
Storage: 2 days in fridge (Thursday Lunch)
Prep Batch: 2 portions total

Ingredients (Shared Batch: 2 portions)

  • 1.5 lbs Chicken Breast (sliced into strips)
  • 2 bunches Asparagus (trimmed)
  • 1 cup Jasmine Rice (dry)
  • 4 tbsp Garlic-infused Olive Oil (divided)
  • 1 whole Lemon (juiced)
  • 1/2 cup Fresh Parsley (chopped)
  • Salt & Pepper to taste

Step-by-Step Instructions

Cook the 1 cup dry rice (or use leftover).
Heat 2 tbsp garlic-infused oil in a large skillet over Medium-High Heat. Sauté the 1.5 lbs chicken strips until golden and internal temp reaches 165°F. Season with salt and pepper.
Remove chicken. Add 2 tbsp garlic oil and the 2 bunches asparagus. Sauté for 4-5 mins until tender-crisp.
Whisk lemon juice and 1/2 cup parsley. Drizzle over the chicken and asparagus.
Serve over jasmine rice.

Portioning Guide (Cooked)

Alexander: 10 oz cooked chicken + 1.5 cups rice + 1/2 bunch asparagus.

Hanna: 6 oz cooked chicken + 1 cup rice + 1/3 bunch asparagus.
